name: 4K-MAX - Half Man (2026) (GB)
plot: When Niall's estranged 'brother' Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives.
cast: Richard Gadd, Jamie Bell, Mitchell Robertson, Stuart Campbell, Neve McIntosh, Marianne McIvor

name: 4K-MAX - DTF St. Louis (2026) (US)
plot: A love triangle among three adults experiencing middle-age malaise leads to one of them ending up dead.
cast: Jason Bateman, David Harbour, Linda Cardellini, Richard Jenkins, Joy Sunday, Arlan Ruf

name: 4K-MAX - Rooster (2026) (US)
plot: On a college campus, an author navigates a complicated relationship with his daughter.
cast: Steve Carell, Danielle Deadwyler, Phil Dunster, John C. McGinley, Lauren Tsai, Charly Clive

name: 4K-MAX - Mira: Life After Divorce (2026) (TR)
plot: When her husband drops the bombshell that he wants a divorce, Mira sets out to rebuild her life on her own terms.
cast: Nehir Erdoğan, Yiğit Özşener, Nezaket Erden

name: 4K-MAX - Jasmine (2025) (TR)
plot: Yasemin is a young woman battling a fatal heart condition, with her obsessive stepbrother Tufan as her only support. Her struggle to make it onto the transplant list draws them into dark networks and morally fraught choices.

name: 4K-MAX - The Graft (2025) (TR)
plot: After his sister’s sudden death, a doctor finds himself entangled with a local crime syndicate and forging a tentative alliance with its new leader.
cast: Serra Arıtürk, Aytaç Şaşmaz, Erol Babaoğlu, Diren Polatoğulları, Deniz Barut, Derin Beşikçioğlu, Yüksel Aksu, Galip Erdal

name: 4K-MAX - IT: Welcome to Derry (2025) (US)
plot: Prequel to IT beginning in 1960s also covering origins of Pennywise the Clown.
cast: Bill Skarsgård, Taylour Paige, Jovan Adepo, Chris Chalk, James Remar, Stephen Rider
director: Andy Muschietti, Barbara Muschietti, Jason Fuchs

name: 4K-MAX - The Chair Company (2025) (US)
plot: After an embarrassing incident at work, suburban family man William Ronald Trosper finds himself investigating a far-reaching conspiracy.
cast: Tim Robinson, Lake Bell, Sophia Lillis, Will Price, Joseph Tudisco

name: 4K-MAX - Mare of Easttown (2021) (US)
plot: A detective in a small Pennsylvania town investigates a local murder while trying to keep her life from falling apart.
cast: Kate Winslet, Jean Smart, Julianne Nicholson, Angourie Rice, Evan Peters, Sosie Bacon, David Denman, Neal Huff

name: 4K-MAX - Task (2025) (US)
plot: In the working-class suburbs of Philadelphia, an FBI agent heads a task force assembled to put an end to a string of violent robberies led by an unsuspecting family man.
cast: Mark Ruffalo, Tom Pelphrey, Emilia Jones, Fabien Frankel, Thuso Mbedu, Raúl Castillo, Alison Oliver, Owen Teague

name: 4K-MAX - A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms (2026) (US)
plot: A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.
cast: Peter Claffey, Dexter Sol Ansell, Finn Bennett, Bertie Carvel, Tanzyn Crawford, Daniel Ings, Sam Spruell, Henry Ashton
director: George R. R. Martin, Ira Parker

name: 4K-MAX - Peacemaker (2022) (US)
plot: The continuing story of Peacemaker, a vainglorious superhero/supervillain who believes in peace at any cost — no matter how many people he has to kill. After a miraculous recovery from his duel with Bloodsport, Peacemaker soon discovers that his freedom comes at a price.
cast: John Cena, Danielle Brooks, Freddie Stroma, Jennifer Holland, Steve Agee, Frank Grillo, Robert Patrick
